name: Rayleigh Silvers
alt_names: シルバーズ・レイリー
description:
__Height:__ 188 cm (6'2")

A famous coating mechanic in the Shabaody Archipelago.

~!He's the former vice captain of the Roger Pirates and is also known as "The Pirate King's Right Hand." He's an old friend of both Hatchan and Shakuyaka. He has also displayed incredible combat strength, fighting par-on-par with Kizaru using a normal sword imbued with Haki. !~
